infobox_data.tooltip:
Provides Linken's Barrier. Cooldown: 6 seconds

Refund: 28.5 gold

description: A defensive item that provides Linken's Barrier, a spell shield which blocks up to two spells from any source.
lore: Lore: The legendary scepter of the ancient mages, used to protect their allies from dark sorcery. Only the most powerful magic can break its barrier.
